channel.title: Home on RSE Group
channel.description: Recent content in Home on RSE Group

item.title: Why Reproducibility Matters in Research Software
item.description: Reproducible research software isn’t just good practice — it’s increasingly a requirement for publication. Here’s how we approach it.

item.title: EpiModel — Epidemiological Simulation Platform
item.description: An open-access platform for infectious disease modelling, providing researchers with real-time case data and reproducible analysis pipelines.

item.title: Malaria — Malaria Simulation Framework
item.description: A framework for writing and solving systems of differential equations, with a library of malaria models and specialised tools for simulation experiments.

item.title: OceanSim — Fisheries Management Tool
item.description: An advanced simulation tool designed to help manage fisheries by modelling the behaviour of fishing fleets and their interactions with the marine environment.
